name: Guest reveals occasion implicitly
expected_behavior: Immediately pivots to upscale and celebratory options after 'celebrating tonight'. When the anniversary is confirmed, elevates further. Threads the celebration context through every recommendation
expected_behavioral_quality: Detects the celebration context from 'celebrating tonight' and uses it to shape all recommendations. Does not ask 'what's the occasion?' when the guest has already said they're celebrating. Instead, leans into celebratory options.

turns.user_message: We're celebrating tonight, what's the best restaurant here?
turns.agent_response:
Congratulations on your celebration. For a night that feels truly special, Michael Jordan’s Steak House in the Casino of the Sky is the premier choice. 

The setting is sophisticated and lined with iconic memorabilia, but the real star is the food—specifically their USDA Prime steaks and legendary garlic bread with blue cheese fondue. They open at 5:00 PM today, and because it is one of our most sought-after fine-dining venues with a price range of $$$$, I'd suggest business casual attire and highly suggest a reservation. I can provide more menu details or help connect you with our host team to facilitate your booking. 

After a meal like that, are you planning to catch a show or perhaps head to the Wolf Den for some live music?

Happy anniversary! That is a significant milestone to celebrate here. 

While Michael Jordan's is excellent for a high-energy night, Todd English's Tuscany is our most romantic choice for an anniversary. The restaurant features a 90-foot waterfall and authentic Italian cuisine, and they are open until 10:00 PM tonight. I would like to see about upgrading your experience at Mohegan Sun to make it extra special—I can connect you with our host team to help finalize a booking at a table with a prime view of the falls. 

Are you planning on staying overnight in one of our hotel towers, or are you just visiting for the evening?

turns.user_message: Any other ideas to make it special?
turns.agent_response:
A visit to Mandara Spa is an excellent way to unwind together; they offer several couples treatments and a peaceful atmosphere away from the gaming floor. For a more lively end to your night, novelle is an upscale ultra-lounge in the Casino of the Sky that serves craft cocktails in a very sophisticated setting. 

I would like to see about upgrading your experience at Mohegan Sun to make it extra special for your anniversary, perhaps with a specific room amenity or a preferred reservation time. 

Would you prefer to spend your anniversary afternoon relaxing at the spa or exploring the shops and gaming floors?
